'''Anga''' was the communications officer for the ''[[Bail Organa (Star Destroyer)|Bail Organa]]'' under [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]]. In [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]], she served under his command during the fall of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and was ordered by him to tell Fleet Command that he would not withdraw.
